commands.review_summary:
The branch forwards `temperature`/`top_p` through Gateway stream params into OpenAI transport builders, adds sampling validation/provider-error mapping, and updates docs, tests, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows both Gateway handlers discard the reported sampling fields before provider transport, and the linked issue gives a concrete curl/proxy-log reproduction path; I did not run it live in this read-only review.
